description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa upholstered in a light gray fabric, featuring two large seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions. The sofa is accessorized with two decorative, square throw pillows in a muted red color with a subtle diamond pattern, and a dark, textured throw draped over one armrest. The armrests are wide, straight, and padded, matching the overall boxy and contemporary silhouette of the piece. The back of the sofa is flat and unadorned, with the same light gray upholstery extending around all sides. The legs are short, block-shaped, and appear to be made of a dark material, providing sturdy support at each corner. This sofa would be suitable for placement in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, sidewalk seating areas, or modern parks.
description: A modern, light gray two-seater sofa with wide, straight armrests, two red patterned throw pillows, and a dark throw blanket. The design is boxy and contemporary, with blocky legs and plush cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat cushions, two red patterned throw pillows, and a dark throw on the right armrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's wide, straight armrest and the draped dark throw blanket.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned back and the sofa's overall boxy shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other armrest and the arrangement of the throw pillows.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose backrest cushions, all uniform in size; two small, square throw pillows placed symmetrically.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, and padded armrests at both ends, extending to the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, modern profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-shaped legs positioned at each corner, dark in color, with a simple and sturdy appearance; legs are exposed and slightly recessed.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest composed of two large, loose cushions, continuous across the width, with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Light gray fabric with a subtle, fine woven texture; throw pillows feature a red fabric with a white diamond pattern, and the throw blanket is solid black with a visible texture.
